title: Review of DOC-485: REV-624

# Review Record REV-624

Document: DOC-485. Reviewer: Sam Dreher. Date: 2023-06-06. Overall disposition: Approved with comments.

## Comments

**C01** (Tyler Moss): Section 8.4: The specification should clarify the interface requirement for DOC-485. Recommend updating the acceptance criteria table. — *Accepted*
